description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is made from dark-stained wood, featuring a smooth, slightly curved butt and a straight comb, typical of military surplus rifles. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with visible iron sights and a scope rail mounted on top of the receiver. The bolt handle is prominent on the right side, and the trigger guard and magazine floorplate are also metallic. The front sight is hooded, and the rear sight is mounted just ahead of the receiver. The overall appearance suggests a robust, utilitarian design, suitable for both military and civilian use.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a dark wooden stock, long blued steel barrel, and iron sights with a scope rail. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring classic military styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and mounted scope rail.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the narrow profile, scope rail, and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full wooden stock.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the butt of the stock, trigger guard, and underside of the barrel.
